item.title: Reverse-Engineering the 8bitDo Retro Mechanical Keyboard
item.description: I have an 8BitDo Retro Mechanical Keyboard, N Edition, the cream-and-grey one that looks like an NES typewriter. It comes with “Super Buttons” that beg to be mapped to something. My something was simple: I wanted one of them to fire a single global hotkey so I could trigger Wispr Flow dictation without contorting my hand. The catch: the only software that programs this keyboard is 8BitDo’s official Windows app, and I only had a mac.
